title: AnnoyingCraft
description: This mod makes the game mentally hard to play
body:
This mod makes the game unplayable and annoying especially for headphone users. It's supposed to be bad and annoying and all that.

 

Adds:

 

A job application that spawns A LOT OF THEM and they make annoying sounds

 

Messages when you break blocks

 

Messages when you join the world

 

When you send a message something bad happens that delays...

 

A text on the top of your screen that you can't take it off (the text is just joking)

 

I'll add more soon obviously I am not done yet :)
